status: OWNER-APPROVED 2026-07-14 ('universal instruction approved'). Wording is canon. ACTIVATION remains A/B-gated per the one-variable rule: isolated frozen-suite A/B vs baseline_live_v0 after tonight's Phase B settles; promote only on lay-language/cross-corpus improvement, no shape regression, negatives 5/5.
model_family_note: Written for Qwen3-Embedding (0.6B today; unchanged semantics if/when the 4B migration happens — instruction_version rides the ProjectionManifest embedding_profile).

baseline_live_v0.instruction: given the user question, retrieve the most relevant information
baseline_live_v0.note: current production instruction — the A/B comparator

universal.instruction: Given a question in everyday language, retrieve passages, summaries, and concepts from books and documents in any field that answer, explain, or underlie it
universal.activation_gate: frozen-suite A/B vs baseline_live_v0 (Fast tier first, then all tiers); promote only on lay-language/cross-corpus improvement with no shape regression and negatives 5/5

instructions_archive_v1_draft.task: Given a question, retrieve source passages that directly answer or discuss it
Given a question, retrieve passages whose surrounding context answers or discusses it
Given a statement or question, retrieve atomic claims that support, refute, or qualify it
Given a question, retrieve section summaries covering the topics it asks about
Given a question, retrieve documents whose overall subject matter covers it
Given a question, retrieve underlying concepts and principles it implicitly involves
Given a described situation or mechanism, retrieve recurring structural patterns that match its causal shape
Given a mechanism or situation, retrieve structurally analogous cases from different fields
